---
title: "Not Found"
subtitle: "Transcription Error: Sequence Mismatch"
image: static/404_bio.jpg
comments: false
---

::: {.column-screen .text-center style="padding: 60px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(44, 62, 80, 0.05) 0%, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.05) 100%);"}

<div class="error-container">
  <img src="static/404_bio.jpg" class="img-fluid rounded-4 shadow-lg mb-5" style="max-width: 600px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
  
  <h1 class="display-1 fw-bold mb-3" style="background: linear-gradient(45deg, #2c3e50, #3498db); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;">404 Error</h1>
  
  <p class="lead fs-3 mb-4">
    Our gene sequencer couldn't locate the requested information.<br>
    It seems like a <strong>transcription error</strong> or a <strong>deleted locus</strong> has occurred.
  </p>
</div>

:::
